steps.description: Rust integration test for Lock flow
steps.command: cd src/api/api && SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test --test sequence_e2e_test seq1_lock -- --nocapture
steps.expected: Test exits with code 0; stdout confirms: lock_id issued, SR_0 computed via SHA3-256("QS_LOCK_V1" || chain_id || asset || amount || dest_addr || expiry || nonce || pk_dilithium), and lockWithSR0 transaction submitted to L1 Vault at 0x6F889C00a5e674ab0b9403AfBa0fBEbe30511c67; no FAILED or panicked lines present

steps.description: Playwright integration spec for Consumer Lock
steps.command: cd src/frontend/web && npx playwright test e2e/integration/lock.integration.spec.ts --reporter=json
steps.expected: All Playwright tests pass (0 failed); JSON reporter output contains a passed result for the lock creation flow; UI reaches success state and a corresponding locks row is observable in the database

steps.description: Verify lock row was created and pk_dilithium populated
steps.command: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -t -A -c "SELECT lock_id, status, length(pk_dilithium) FROM locks ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;"
steps.expected: Exactly one row is returned; status is either 'pending' or 'locked'; length(pk_dilithium) is exactly 1952 bytes (Dilithium public key size); lock_id is non-null and non-empty

steps.description: Verify totalLocked increased on Sepolia Vault
steps.expected: Returned uint256 value is strictly greater than 0 wei, confirming at least one Deposit was accepted by the L1 Vault and the Locked event was emitted; command exits with code 0

acceptance_criteria: Backend integration test (seq1_lock) exits with code 0 and stdout confirms SR_0 was computed and lockWithSR0 was submitted to L1
Playwright lock.integration.spec.ts reports 0 failed tests and the UI lock creation flow reaches a success state
The most recent row in the locks table has status equal to 'locked' or 'pending' — not null, not error
The most recent row in the locks table has length(pk_dilithium) equal to exactly 1952 bytes
cast call to Sepolia Vault totalLocked() returns a value strictly greater than 0 wei
No hardcoded bypass, stub response, or silent fallback is present in the backend trace — the Dilithium signature must be verified and nonce must be checked before lock_id is issued
The L1 Vault address used in all steps resolves to 0x6F889C00a5e674ab0b9403AfBa0fBEbe30511c67 (canonical Sepolia deployment per SEQUENCES.md §Architecture)
